worthClicking.author: @_vmlops
worthClicking.why: OpenAI open-sourced their Agents SDK with a clean 3-primitive design (agents, handoffs, tracing) that works across 100+ LLMs — directly relevant to evaluating agent infrastructure choices.

worthClicking.author: @weezerOSINT
worthClicking.why: Notion's public pages expose every editor's email with a single unauthenticated POST request — a concrete ops security risk if your team uses public Notion wikis.

worthClicking.author: @heynavtoor
worthClicking.why: The Candy Crush / Microsoft AI replacement story is a clean narrative example of AI-driven workforce displacement that's useful context for sales conversations about AI adoption.

voices.why: Surfaced a real, reproducible Notion security flaw with technical specifics — worth watching for infra/tooling risks.

examples: vague motivational quote farming (Dostoevsky quote, FinanceLancelot)
personal/social noise (beach DJ set, 'let the builders build')
low-effort AI job displacement takes and LLM interview listicles
